title: Computational System Model catalog entry
description: Schema for a single catalog entry. Every entry is one YAML file under data/<domain>/. Volatile fields may carry the sentinel string 'unstated — needs direct verification' instead of a guessed value.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, unique across the catalog. Matches the filename stem.

name.description: Canonical name of the model or tool.

gloss.description: One-line plain-language description for a non-specialist.

domain.description: Domain slug; must exist in data/domains.yml.

system_represented.description: The engineered system the model represents.

inputs_you_can_change.description: Specific inputs or parameters a user can vary.

outputs_you_can_observe.description: Specific outcomes of interest that respond to changed inputs.

runtime_required.description: Tool, language, or runtime needed to actually run it.

access_type.description: How a user gets access. Mandatory. Never used as an inclusion filter.

license.description: License name where applicable, or the unstated sentinel.

element_count.description: Approximate element count for a representative runnable model, or the unstated sentinel. The inclusion test requires more than 25 interacting elements.

grouping.description: How elements group into subsystems, or the unstated sentinel.

notes.description: Optional clarification of what counts as an element for this tool.

status.description: active = frequent releases/commits; maintained = updated but slower; dormant = no recent activity but usable; abandoned = unmaintained; unknown = could not determine.

latest_version.description: Latest version string, or the unstated sentinel.

latest_release_date.description: Latest release date (ISO or year), or the unstated sentinel.

notes.description: Optional clarification of how maintenance status / version was judged.

suitability.description: Who it suits, e.g. newcomer versus expert, and in what role.

executability_justification.description: Why this entry passes the executability inclusion test: what a user varies and what observably changes.

last_verified.description: ISO date the volatile facts were confirmed. Mandatory.

source_per_field.description: Map of volatile field name -> source (URL or short note). Should cover at least version/license/maintenance and access_link.

overall.description: Honest overall confidence in the volatile facts.

unverified.description: Explicit list of field names whose values are unverified or carry the unstated sentinel. May be empty.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for cross-cutting themes.
